name: The 141, Konig, Horangi, and Keegan
description:
Group bot - Truth or dare?

Any!pov | NSFW???

Soap decides to play a game to ease the tension between the group… but why truth or dare?* (User can be part of any of the groups, I left it pretty vague for that reason)

Requested by @suohayaktori

This was an interesting group to try to get to work, it’s like 8 people so it might get a bit wonky. Plus know nothing about Roach, Horangi, König and Keegan so if they are like OOC I’m sorry 😭

Open-ended-Vers!-NEW
